all.en: MEMORANDUM
all.zh: 備忘錄

all.en: TO: All Staff
all.zh: 致：全體員工

all.en: FROM: Human Resources Department
all.zh: 發信人：人力資源部

all.en: DATE: September 8
all.zh: 日期：9 月 8 日

all.en: RE: Updated Remote Work Policy
all.zh: 主旨：遠端工作政策更新

all.en: Following extensive consultation with department heads and employee representatives, management is pleased to introduce a revised remote work policy effective October 1.
all.zh: 經過與各部門主管及員工代表的廣泛諮詢後，管理階層欣然推出修訂版遠端工作政策，自 10 月 1 日起生效。

all.en: Under the new framework, eligible employees may work remotely up to three days per week.
all.zh: 根據新框架，符合資格的員工每週最多可遠端工作三天。

all.en: To qualify, an employee must have completed at least six months of continuous service in their current position.
all.zh: 符合資格者，必須已在目前職位連續任職至少六個月。

all.en: Performance evaluations from the most recent review cycle must also rate the employee as meeting or exceeding expectations.
all.zh: 最近一次考核週期的績效評估也必須達到或超過預期。

all.en: Roles that require on-site presence, such as laboratory technicians and front-desk personnel, are not eligible at this time.
all.zh: 需要現場出勤的職務，例如實驗室技術員及櫃台人員，目前不符合資格。

all.en: Employees who wish to participate must submit a formal application through the HR online portal at least 14 days before the requested start date.
all.zh: 希望參與的員工必須在預定開始日期前至少 14 天，透過 HR 線上入口網站提交正式申請。

all.en: The application must be approved by both the immediate supervisor and the department director.
all.zh: 申請必須獲得直屬主管及部門總監雙方核准。

all.en: Approved participants are required to maintain consistent core working hours from 10:00 A.M. to 3:00 P.M., regardless of location.
all.zh: 獲准參與者必須維持一致的核心工作時間，即上午 10 點至下午 3 點，無論身處何處。

all.en: All remote workers must ensure they have a secure internet connection and a quiet, professional workspace.
all.zh: 所有遠端工作者必須確保擁有安全的網路連線及安靜、專業的工作空間。

all.en: The company will provide a one-time stipend of 300 dollars to assist with home office setup.
all.zh: 公司將提供一次性 300 美元的津貼，協助居家辦公室設置。

all.en: Participants must attend in-person team meetings every Tuesday and any client meetings designated as on-site.
all.zh: 參與者必須出席每週二的實體團隊會議，以及任何指定為現場的客戶會議。

all.en: The arrangement will be reviewed every six months to ensure it continues to meet both employee and business needs.
all.zh: 此安排將每六個月檢討一次，以確保持續符合員工及業務需求。

all.en: Detailed guidelines and the application form are available on the company intranet under the Human Resources tab.
all.zh: 詳細指南及申請表可於公司內部網路的人力資源頁面取得。

all.en: Questions regarding the new policy may be directed to your HR business partner.
all.zh: 有關新政策的問題，可向您的 HR 業務夥伴詢問。

all.en: Managers are encouraged to schedule regular one-on-one check-ins with their remote team members each week.
all.zh: 鼓勵主管每週與遠端工作的團隊成員安排定期的一對一面談。

all.en: Confidential documents should never be printed at home unless an approved secure printer has been issued.
all.zh: 機密文件絕不應於家中列印，除非已配發核准的安全印表機。

all.en: Company-issued laptops must be used for all remote work activities to ensure proper data protection.
all.zh: 所有遠端工作活動必須使用公司配發的筆記型電腦，以確保資料受到妥善保護。

all.en: Employees who travel internationally while working remotely must notify HR and the legal team in advance.
all.zh: 遠端工作期間出國旅行的員工，必須事先通知人力資源部及法務團隊。

all.en: A mandatory training session on cybersecurity best practices will be offered to all participants in September.
all.zh: 將於 9 月為所有參與者舉辦強制性的網路安全最佳實務訓練。

all.en: Productivity will be measured by clearly defined goals rather than the number of hours logged online.
all.zh: 生產力將以明確訂定的目標來衡量，而非以線上紀錄的時數計算。

all.en: Employees experiencing difficulties with remote work may request a temporary return to the office at any time.
all.zh: 在遠端工作上遇到困難的員工，可隨時申請暫時返回辦公室。

all.en: The IT helpdesk will extend its hours from 7 A.M. to 9 P.M. to support distributed teams.
all.zh: IT 服務台將延長服務時間至上午 7 點至晚上 9 點，以支援分散式團隊。

all.en: Team-building events will continue to be organized quarterly to maintain a strong sense of community.
all.zh: 團隊建立活動將持續每季舉辦，以維持強烈的團隊凝聚感。

all.en: We trust this updated policy will offer greater flexibility while continuing to drive organizational success.
all.zh: 我們相信這份更新的政策將提供更大的彈性，同時持續推動組織的成功。

all.en: Employees are reminded that all work-related communications should occur through company-approved channels even when working from home.
all.zh: 提醒員工，所有與工作相關的溝通即使在家工作期間也應透過公司核准的管道進行。

all.en: Time spent on personal errands during core hours must be logged using the standard time-tracking system.
all.zh: 在核心工作時間內處理私人事務的時間，必須使用標準的工時記錄系統登錄。

all.en: Department directors will receive monthly utilization reports to monitor the overall effectiveness of the program.
all.zh: 部門總監將每月收到使用率報告，以監測整體計畫的成效。

all.en: Any equipment damaged or lost while working remotely must be reported to the IT department within 48 hours.
all.zh: 遠端工作期間任何設備損壞或遺失，必須於 48 小時內向 IT 部門通報。

all.en: Employees relocating to a different state or country must obtain prior written approval to remain compliant with tax regulations.
all.zh: 搬遷至不同州或國家的員工必須事先取得書面核准，以遵守稅務法規。

all.en: A dedicated mentor will be assigned to each newly approved remote worker for the first 90 days of participation.
all.zh: 每位新獲准的遠端工作者將在參與計畫的前 90 天內獲派一位專屬導師。

all.en: Anonymous feedback surveys will be distributed twice a year to capture suggestions from participating staff.
all.zh: 每年將發放兩次匿名回饋問卷，以蒐集參與員工的建議。

all.en: Failure to comply with the policy may result in temporary suspension or permanent revocation of remote work privileges.
all.zh: 未遵守政策可能導致暫時中止或永久取消遠端工作權利。

all.en: Special accommodations for medical or family reasons will be reviewed individually by the human resources committee.
all.zh: 因醫療或家庭因素提出的特殊安排申請，將由人力資源委員會個別審核。

all.en: Thank you for your cooperation as we work together to make this new arrangement a success for everyone.
all.zh: 感謝您的合作，讓我們一同努力使這項新安排對所有人都能順利成功。

all.en: I will admit that working from my kitchen table for two years has taught me how badly I need a proper chair.
all.zh: 我得承認，在廚房餐桌上工作兩年後，我終於明白自己有多需要一張像樣的椅子。

all.en: My dog has somehow learned to recognize the sound of a Zoom call starting and immediately demands attention.
all.zh: 我家狗狗不知怎麼學會了辨識 Zoom 通話的開場聲，然後立刻來討摸摸。

all.en: Several colleagues told me they actually prefer Tuesday office days because that is when the cafeteria serves curry.
all.zh: 好幾位同事告訴我他們其實滿喜歡週二進辦公室的，因為那天員工餐廳會供應咖哩。

all.en: If you live in a noisy apartment, investing in a decent pair of noise-canceling headphones is honestly a game changer.
all.zh: 如果您住在吵雜的公寓裡，老實說投資一副像樣的降噪耳機真的會徹底改變工作體驗。

all.en: Don't underestimate how much a simple morning walk can replace the mental shift that a commute used to provide.
all.zh: 別小看一段簡單的晨間散步，它真的能取代過去通勤帶給您的那種心情切換感。

all.en: My neighbor keeps assuming I have all day free because I work from home, which has led to some awkward conversations.
all.zh: 我的鄰居一直以為我在家工作就整天都有空，因此引發了一些尷尬的對話。

all.en: Try to put on real clothes instead of pajamas before your first meeting, even if no one can see below the camera.
all.zh: 請在第一場會議前換上正常衣服而不要穿著睡衣，即使鏡頭外沒人看得到下半身。

all.en: I found that setting a hard stop at 6 P.M. and physically closing my laptop helps me actually feel done with work.
all.zh: 我發現晚上 6 點硬性收工並實際把筆電蓋上，能真正讓我感覺到下班了。

all.en: Some teams have started doing virtual coffee chats on Friday afternoons just to recreate that hallway conversation feel.
all.zh: 有些團隊開始在週五下午舉辦線上咖啡聊天，只為了重現走廊上閒聊的那種氛圍。

all.en: If your internet drops during a client call, just be honest and reconnect from your phone rather than pretend it never happened.
all.zh: 如果在客戶通話中網路斷線，誠實一點，用手機重新連線就好，不要假裝沒發生過。
